final:
module top_module(
	input [31:0] stage2_imm,
	input [31:0] stage2_rs2_data,
	input BSelSignal,
	output [31:0] stage2_alu_in2
);assign stage2_alu_in2 = (BSelSignal)? stage2_imm : stage2_rs2_data;

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      stage2_alu_in2 <= ~stage2_imm; stage2_alu_in2 <= ~stage2_rs2_data;
    end
  end

endmodule
